series_metadata.series_description: Records created to develop schedules for computer runs for software and/or database updates along with records associated with the runs. Records may include: daily schedules; run reports; run requests; and other records documenting the successful completion of a run. (Reference: DAS IT-OP-10)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: no longer of administrative or fiscal value, and ; Electronic: no longer of administrative or fiscal value, and
